hooks.command: node "$(d="$PWD"; while [ "$d" != / ]; do if [ -f "$d/.codex/hooks/session-start.cjs" ]; then printf %s "$d/.codex/hooks/session-start.cjs"; exit 0; fi; d="$(dirname "$d")"; done; printf %s ".codex/hooks/session-start.cjs")"

node "$(d="$PWD"; while [ "$d" != / ]; do if [ -f "$d/.codex/hooks/pre-tool-use.cjs" ]; then printf %s "$d/.codex/hooks/pre-tool-use.cjs"; exit 0; fi; d="$(dirname "$d")"; done; printf %s ".codex/hooks/pre-tool-use.cjs")"
node "$(d="$PWD"; while [ "$d" != / ]; do if [ -f "$d/.codex/hooks/stop.cjs" ]; then printf %s "$d/.codex/hooks/stop.cjs"; exit 0; fi; d="$(dirname "$d")"; done; printf %s ".codex/hooks/stop.cjs")"
